title: Fluffy Spanish Sushi Rice Crema Catalana
description: A nutty and indulgent Spanish dish featuring sushi rice, sashimi-cut ingredients, and a cheese-pull effect, all in a traditional crema catalana form, made gluten-free friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, combine the cream, milk, sugar, and vanilla extract, and heat over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Gradually add the warm cream mixture to the eggs, whisking constantly.
Stir in the cooked sushi rice and sashimi-cut tuna, if using.
Pour the mixture into 6 ramekins or small baking dishes.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until chilled.
Just before serving, sprinkle the idiazabal cheese over the top of each ramekin and caramelize with a kitchen torch, if desired.
